nasb.text: God came to Laban the Aramean in a dream of the night and said to him, “Be careful that you do not speak to Jacob either good or bad.”

esv.text: But God came to Laban the Aramean in a dream by night and said to him, “Be careful not to say anything to Jacob, either good or bad.”

cnv.text: 當天晚上，　神在夢中來到亞蘭人拉班那裡，對他說：“你要小心，不可與雅各說甚麼。”

ccb.text: 当天晚上，上帝在梦中对亚兰人拉班说：“你要当心，不可对雅各多说什么。”

csbs.text: 神藉着夜间的一个梦来到亚兰人拉班那里，对他说：“你要小心，不可与雅各说好说歹。”
